title: When downloading a file from Monday it should be clickable/finable in computer folder.

posts.author: FranP (FranP)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I think it would be really great if when you downloaded a file from a monday task/project/etc. it would show a prompt (similar to google chrome or firefox) where you can click and see where the file went.

This would save me a couple steps of opening windows file explorer and searching for where the file is. It would be a really cool addition to the Windows (and Mac) desktop app.
